ddls:
CREATE TABLE "incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the incident */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the incident (e.g., OTHER OFFENSES, WARRANTS, FRAUD) */,
  "x_coordinate" REAL /* X-coordinate of the incident location */,
  "y_coordinate" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the incident location */,
  "x_scaled" REAL /* Scaled X-coordinate for clustering */,
  "y_scaled" REAL /* Scaled Y-coordinate for clustering */,
  "cluster_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cluster the incident belongs to */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the incident was resolved */,
  "resolution_description" TEXT /* Description of how the incident was resolved */,
  "district" TEXT /* The police district where the incident occurred */,
  "street_address" TEXT /* The street address where the incident occurred */,
  "city" TEXT /* The city where the incident occurred */,
  "state" TEXT /* The state where the incident occurred */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* The ZIP code where the incident occurred */,
  "incident_time" TEXT /* Time of the incident */,
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the officer who reported the incident */,
  "victim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the victim (if applicable) */,
  "suspect_id" INTEGER /* ID of the suspect (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_cluster_id FOREIGN KEY ("cluster_id") REFERENCES clusters ("cluster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the category (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the category is active or deprecated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clusters" (
  "cluster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cluster */,
  "cluster_name" TEXT /* Name of the cluster */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cluster */,
  "cluster_center_x" REAL /* X-coordinate of the cluster center */,
  "cluster_center_y" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the cluster center */,
  "cluster_radius" REAL /* Radius of the cluster */,
  "cluster_size" INTEGER /* Number of incidents in the cluster */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cluster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident */,
  "x_coordinate" REAL /* X-coordinate of the location */,
  "y_coordinate" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the location */,
  "street_address" TEXT /* Street address of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the location */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the location */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* ZIP code of the location */,
  "district" TEXT /* Police district of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_locations_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., police officer, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the incident */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the incident was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the system (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the incident */,
  "reported_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who reported the incident */,
  "contact_information" TEXT /* Contact information of the person who reported the incident */,
  "reported_time" TEXT /* Time of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_reports_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of the update */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who updated the incident */,
  "contact_information" TEXT /* Contact information of the person who updated the incident */,
  "update_time" TEXT /* Time of the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_updates_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status update */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date of the status update */,
  "status_description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  "status_changed_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who changed the status */,
  "contact_information" TEXT /* Contact information of the person who changed the status */,
  "status_change_time" TEXT /* Time when the status was changed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_status_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "incident_id1" INTEGER /* ID of the first incident */,
  "incident_id2" INTEGER /* ID of the second incident */,
  "link_description" TEXT /* Description of the link */,
  "link_type" TEXT /* Type of link (e.g., related, follow-up) */,
  "link_created_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who created the link */,
  "link_created_date" TEXT /* Date when the link was created */,
  "link_created_time" TEXT /* Time when the link was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_links_incident_id1 FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id1") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_links_incident_id2 FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id2") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)
